title: Aitsite 52PCS Christmas Candy Ceiling Decorations, Christmas Hanging Foil Swirl Decorations, Candy Ceiling Decor for Indoor Outdoor Ceiling Xmas Holiday Party Supplies
features: 🍭【Xmas Party Supplies Set】You will receive a set of 52 ceiling christmas decorations including 26 Christmas candy hanging cards and 26 foil hanging swirls. A sufficient number of christmas ceiling decorations will bring you a strong Christmas spirit for all your decorating needs. Celebrate Christmas time with the exquisite christmas hanging decorations.

🍭【Christmas Element】Christmas ceiling decorations have a classic Christmas element with their candy design and the red and white colour scheme makes for a great Christmas atmosphere. These fun and cute christmas decorations hanging won't go out of style and can be applied to your next Christmas party. Christmas ceiling hanging decorations will be a beautiful addition to your festive decorations or party supplies, adding a cheerful and sweet atmosphere to your Christmas party.

🍭【Premium Material】Hanging christmas decorations indoor are made from high quality materials, with a vibrant colour scheme, lovely unique design, clear printing and durability. Xmas ceiling decorations are not easy to tear or fade, and can be applied multiple times in different occasions, making them the best choice for decorating Christmas.

🍭【Easy to Install】These lovely christmas ceiling decoration come pre-assembled and it only takes a few seconds to hang them from the ceiling, walls, doors or branches wherever you want to decorate - simple and convenient so you can save even more time to enjoy the party.

🍭【Wide Applications】These ceiling decorations xmas are suitable for Christmas themed parties, festive rows, birthday parties and more, you can hang them from ceilings, windows, fireplaces, tree branches or anywhere you like. You can also use Christmas foil decorations as decorations or photo backdrops with other Christmas ornaments to add an extra special touch to your party.
